subcodes.first_line: The Book of God proclaimeth: There is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and the Divine Lote-Tree declareth: Sovereignty belongeth unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم و سدره المنتهی تنادی الملک لله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @contention and conflict, @prayer for unity, @Word of God and human limitations, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @suffering and imprisonment
